campaigns.title: SVX — Webinar Re-engagement
campaigns.webinarAngle: Exclusivity — SVX investor audience gets early access to the Climate Tech Exit Lab framework before it goes public. BTC brings the content, SVX brings the list.
campaigns.ecosystemNote: SVX is a CAFIID member. Both Keyona and Bryan have equal social capital on this contact.
campaigns.waitingOn: James's response. Sent by Keyona Apr 6 2026.
campaigns.usageNote: Sent Apr 6 2026. Both Keyona and Bryan have equal social capital on this contact.
campaigns.emailSubject: Picking back up — webinar idea for your community
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey James,

Hope the new year is treating you well. We connected late last year and I've been thinking about a collaboration that could be a good fit for your community.

We're putting together a webinar series on climate tech exits — breaking down how exits actually work in this space for small-check investors who want to understand the landscape before they commit capital. It's practical, framework-driven content that honestly doesn't exist anywhere else right now.

I'd love to co-host one session with SVX. You bring the audience, we bring the content. Low lift on your end, real value for your community.

Worth a 20-minute call to see if it makes sense?

Bryan

campaigns.title: Bryan Watson — Clean Tech North + OCTIA Webinar Pitch
campaigns.contactOrg: Clean Tech North + Ontario Clean Tech Industry Association
campaigns.webinarAngle: Bryan Watson is connected to both Clean Tech North and OCTIA. One email, two org distributions. Years of mutual webinar history — already a known format for them.
campaigns.ecosystemNote: Bryan Watson is a founder or board member of both Clean Tech North and OCTIA.
campaigns.waitingOn: Bryan Watson's response. Sent by Keyona Apr 6 2026.
campaigns.usageNote: Sent Apr 6 2026. Updated draft to reference Bryan Watson's connection to both orgs.
campaigns.emailSubject: Webinar collab — want to co-host one session?
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey Bryan,

Hope you're feeling rested after the long weekend!

Bryan Duarte and I have been talking about doing more collaborative content this year, and he mentioned you and your work with both Clean Tech North and the Ontario Clean Tech Industry Association. We think there are some natural synergies there.

We're launching the Climate Tech Exit Lab this year — an initiative for both founders and investors on what goes into successful climate tech investments and exits. We'd love to co-host one session that we could bring to both communities.

Would you be open to a quick conversation to see if it's a fit?

Bryan

campaigns.emailSubject: Webinar collab — climate tech exits for your community
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey [Name],

I'm Bryan — I run Black Tech Capital, a climate tech nano VC.

I've been following CAFIID's work and noticed your Climate Finance Community of Practice — the work your members are doing sits right at the intersection of what we're building. We're launching the Climate Tech Exit Lab this year, focused on how climate tech investments and exits actually work, and I think your community would find real value in a session on it.

I'd love to co-host one event with CAFIID. You bring the audience, we bring the content.

Worth a quick conversation?

Bryan

campaigns.emailSubject: New Fund Updates from BlackTech Capital (climate fund)
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey Emma,

I hope you're doing well and had a restful long weekend! I'm reaching out because Bryan and I have made substantive changes to our fund structure and raise progress. If there's time on the calendar in the next few weeks, I'd love to get us on a call to catch up and update you on what we've been up to since our last conversation.

All my best,
Keyona

campaigns.title: Atmospheric Fund — ABM First Touch
campaigns.ecosystemNote: Bryan has a direct contact here. Warm, not cold. Bryan's note: doesn't need to be over-personalized — collegial colleague tone is sufficient.
campaigns.usageNote: Bryan confirmed contact is Uzoma Erondu. Warm — Bryan knows him. Collegial tone, no LinkedIn life-update language. Draft and send to Bryan for greenlight.
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hi Uzoma,

I'm Keyona — I co-manage Black Tech Capital with Bryan Duarte. We're a climate tech nano VC investing at the earliest stages of the ecosystem and are working toward our first close.

Bryan mentioned you as someone we should connect with. I'd love to set up a brief call to share what we're building and hear more about where the Atmospheric Fund is focused right now.

Would that work?
